pr.title: Rename ftKb_SpecialNFx to ftkirbyspecialfox, match most functions
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2227 renamed Kirby's copied Fox/Falco neutral-special translation unit from ftKb_SpecialNFx.c to ftkirbyspecialfox.c, updated build/split/symbol/header references, typed the Kirby fighter var xB0 as an HSD_GObj* blaster item pointer, and added or improved many function bodies for the new unit. The automated report recorded +1592 matched-code bytes, 36 new matches in the renamed unit, and 3 unmatched-item improvements, while also showing old-unit broken matches consistent with the file rename.

key_files.role: new renamed translation unit with expanded Kirby Fox/Falco blaster special implementations and helper inlines
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new file mode for ftkirbyspecialfox.c

raw_diff: functions ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDC70, ftKb_SpecialNFx_OnChangeAction, ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDDF4, ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE100, ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE240 and FxSpecialN/FxSpecialAirN anim handlers added
raw_diff: deleted file mode for ftKb_SpecialNFx.c

key_files.role: renamed split entry while preserving text and sdata2 ranges
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: split path changed from ftKb_SpecialNFx.c to ftkirbyspecialfox.c with .text 0x800FDC70-0x800FEDD0 and .sdata2 0x804D944C-0x804D9474

key_files.role: renamed two address-style function symbols to semantic ftKb_SpecialNFx names
updated object list to build renamed translation unit path
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Object(NonMatching, ftKb_SpecialNFx.c) changed to Object(NonMatching, ftkirbyspecialfox.c)

key_files.role: updated prototypes for renamed semantic functions
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: prototype fn_800FDCE0 changed to ftKb_SpecialNFx_OnChangeAction
diff_excerpt: prototype fn_800FE0E0 changed to ftKb_SpecialNFx_CreateBlasterShot

key_files.role: recovered xB0 type and field meaning for Kirby fighter vars
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1166-1175: xB0 changed from u32 to HSD_GObj* with comment Fox/Falco blaster item

what_changed.text: Renamed the Kirby Fox copied-special source file to ftkirbyspecialfox.c and synchronized the split table and build object path.
Renamed fn_800FDCE0 to ftKb_SpecialNFx_OnChangeAction and fn_800FE0E0 to ftKb_SpecialNFx_CreateBlasterShot in symbols and header declarations.

Added implementations for previously stubbed or todo-marked functions such as ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDC70, ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDDF4, ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE100, ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE240, and several FxSpecialN/FxSpecialAirN animation routines.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted file had /// # markers for several functions
raw_diff: new file contains function bodies
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists 36 new matches and 3 unmatched-item improvements

what_changed.text: Replaced magic motion-state case labels in ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDD4C with ftKb_MS_* and ftCo_MS_* enum names while retaining numeric offset arithmetic.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: new function uses ftKb_MS_FxSpecialNStart, ftKb_MS_FcSpecialNStart, ftCo_MS_ThrowB, and related enum cases

what_changed.text: Typed ftKb_FighterVars.xB0 as HSD_GObj* and documented it as the Fox/Falco blaster item.

smart_moves.text: The rename was propagated through splits, configure.py, symbols, and prototypes rather than only moving the C file.
Recovered a concrete field type for xB0 and then used it as an object pointer in blaster-handling code, reducing reliance on integer storage for item object state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: calls using fp->fv.kb.xB0 with it_802ADDD0, it_802AE538, it_802AE608, it_802AEAB4

smart_moves.text: Factored repeated Fox/Falco hat-kind selection into small inline helpers for blaster item IDs and start/loop/end motion IDs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline ftKbGetStartMotionId, ftKbGetAirStartMotionId, ftKbGetLoopMotionId, ftKbGetEndMotionId, ftKbGetAirLoopMotionId

decomp_lessons.lesson: For translation-unit renames, update all path surfaces together: split entries, build object lists, symbols/prototypes, and source filenames. Otherwise automated reports may show old-unit broken matches even when the renamed unit gains matches.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: splits.txt and configure.py path rename
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists new matches under ftkirbyspecialfox and broken matches under ftKb_SpecialNFx

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a field's role is recovered from the decompilation, typing it in the owning struct can make item/object interactions clearer than storing the value as u32 and repeatedly casting.
evidence_refs: raw_diff lines 1166-1175: xB0 u32 to HSD_GObj* Fox/Falco blaster item
diff_excerpt: new code uses fp->fv.kb.xB0 in item helper calls

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing literal motion-state IDs with existing enum names improves reviewability when the enum names are available and the old code already comments the intended states.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: old ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDD4C used numeric cases with comments
diff_excerpt: new ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDD4C uses ftKb_MS_* and ftCo_MS_* cases

naming_conventions.name: ftkirbyspecialfox.c
naming_conventions.convention: lowercase character/special file naming for Kirby's copied Fox special source path
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: split and configure path rename

naming_conventions.name: ftKb_SpecialNFx_OnChangeAction
naming_conventions.convention: semantic name for 0x800FDCE0 replacing fn_ address-style name when body calls action-change helpers
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function body calls ft_800892A0 and ft_80089824

naming_conventions.name: ftKb_SpecialNFx_CreateBlasterShot
naming_conventions.convention: semantic name for 0x800FE0E0 replacing fn_ address-style name when wrapper invokes blaster-shot creation/update function

naming_conventions.name: fp, gobj, da, blasterGObj
naming_conventions.convention: short local role names for fighter pointer, game object, data attributes, and created blaster object

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used narrow stack-padding tactics in specific functions, including FORCE_PAD_STACK_8 and PAD_STACK(8), where the PR's automated report shows those functions as matched or improved.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDEE0 and ftKb_FxSpecialAirNLoop_Anim use PAD_STACK(8)
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists ftKb_SpecialNFx_OnChangeAction and ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FDEE0 as 100% new matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced inline helper functions to share hat-kind dispatch while preserving likely inlined callsite codegen for motion IDs, blaster item IDs, and callback setup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline ftKbGetBlasterId and ftKbGet*MotionId helpers
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists multiple affected animation functions as 100% new matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used OSReport plus HSD_ASSERT on blaster creation failure paths in the new start functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE100 has OSReport("ftToSpecialNFox::Caution!!!\n") and HSD_ASSERT(429, 0)
raw_diff: ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE240 has OSReport("ftToSpecialNFox::Caution!!!\n") and HSD_ASSERT(465, 0)

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 recorded matched code 55.24% (+0.04%, +1592 bytes), 36 new matches in main/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftkirbyspecialfox, 3 improvements in unmatched items, 30 broken matches under the old ftKb_SpecialNFx unit, and 1 old-unit .sdata2 unmatched regression.
No human review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: ftKb_FighterVars xB0 Fox/Falco blaster item uses
Kirby copied Fox special blaster callbacks death2_cb take_dmg_cb accessory4_cb
old ftKb_SpecialNFx .sdata2 regression after ftkirbyspecialfox rename

evidence_refs: raw_diff.diff truncated but targeted sections loaded
notes: The PR body is empty and no human review comments are loaded.
The raw diff excerpt in the prompt is truncated, but targeted local reads recovered the helper-inline and types.h sections needed for this intake.
Automated match data supports match-progress claims, but no local build, objdiff command output, or author rationale is present beyond the bot report.
The bot report's broken matches are listed under the deleted old unit path, so they are treated as rename/report artifacts rather than proof of functional regression.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Coordinate translation-unit renames across split, build, symbol, and header surfaces
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2227 shows a focused TU rename from ftKb_SpecialNFx.c to ftkirbyspecialfox.c with matching updates in config/GALE01/splits.txt, configure.py, config/GALE01/symbols.txt, and ftKb_Init.h. Automated reporting then attributed gains to the new unit and losses to the old unit path.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Promote recovered object-pointer fighter vars out of integer storage
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR changed ftKb_FighterVars.xB0 from u32 to HSD_GObj* with a Fox/Falco blaster item comment, and the new source uses that field with item object helper calls.

source_update_candidates.title: Kirby copied Fox/Falco neutral-special source path renamed
source_update_candidates.text: In PR 2227, the split/build path for the Kirby Fox/Falco copied neutral-special unit changed from src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftKb_SpecialNFx.c to src/melee/ft/chara/ftKirby/ftkirbyspecialfox.c. The split ranges remained .text 0x800FDC70-0x800FEDD0 and .sdata2 0x804D944C-0x804D9474 in the shown diff.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: splits.txt path rename and ranges
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible source-owned path fact for curator review; not promoted by intake.

source_update_candidates.title: ftKb_FighterVars.xB0 typed as Fox/Falco blaster item object
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2227 changed ftKb_FighterVars.xB0 from u32 to HSD_GObj* with the comment 'Fox/Falco blaster item'.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could be curated as a struct-field/path fact if not already represented in current source facts.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat rename-induced old-unit broken matches separately from true regressions
source_update_candidates.text: When a PR renames a translation unit and the report shows new matches under the new unit plus broken matches under the old unit, curator may consider documenting that intake should classify the old-unit losses as rename/report noise unless additional evidence shows actual regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: 36 new matches under ftkirbyspecialfox and 30 broken matches under ftKb_SpecialNFx
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential reporting interpretation standard; requires curator review because one PR is limited evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every function in ftkirbyspecialfox.c matched; the bot report names 36 new matches and 3 unmatched-item improvements, with ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE100 and ftKb_SpecialNFx_800FE240 shown below 100%.
Do not treat PAD_STACK or FORCE_PAD_STACK use as generally accepted style from this PR alone; the evidence only supports narrow use in this file with automated match reporting.
Do not promote human reviewer intent or approval rationale; no human review comments were loaded.
